prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, optimize the thermal stability of Nucleoprotein (viral nucleocapsid protein) from Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2. outline a computational methodology for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Nucleoprotein; organism: Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2; catalogue version v1.0
